name: japanfizz
description: Naka is a Japanese campus-local anonymous app for university students, focused on nearby posts, memes, questions, classes, circles, and after-class chatter.

scripts.check: node --check app.js && node --check www/app.js && node --check scripts/smoke-test.mjs && python3 -m json.tool manifest.webmanifest >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool www/manifest.webmanifest >/dev/null && python3 -m json.tool capacitor.config.json >/dev/null
